nature_language:
We are 4 people departing from Shenzhen for a 3-day trip to Shanghai, and we need to meet any one of the following requirements:
1. We want to try these restaurants: Pure Harvest Workshop, Xinguang Restaurant Fangliang Crab Feast (Huangpu Branch), and The Club Room at Shanghai EDITION Hotel - EDITION Space.
2. We want to stay at a hotel of the type Sauna.
